details.description: Daytime exterior view of the main terminal at Sphinx International Airport. The facade features a broad portico of tall, sandstone-colored columns with capitals inspired by ancient Egyptian forms, giving the building a pronounced Egyptian Revival character. Above the entrance is large bilingual signage reading “SPHINX INTERNATIONAL AIRPORT” in English and Arabic. Flanking the portico are modern glass curtain walls. In the foreground is the terminal forecourt with a curbside drop-off lane, yellow-and-black curbstones, trimmed shrubs, a parked SUV, and luggage trolleys. The sky is clear and blue, and people are visible near the entrance.

details.description: foreground shows the entrance of Sphinx International Airport with a colonnade of tall columns supporting a flat roof, a modern glass-and-stone facade, and a wide forecourt. A prominent sign reads SPHINX INTERNATIONAL AIRPORT in English (with Arabic script nearby). In the foreground, a dark SUV is parked at the curb and a metal luggage trolley sits nearby. The area is landscaped with trimmed shrubs along the entrance, and the sky is clear blue with bright daylight. People are visible around the terminal, suggesting arrival or departure activity.

details.description: Curbside view of the main entrance of Sphinx International Airport in Giza, Egypt. The facade displays large white lettering reading "SPHINX INTERNATIONAL AIRPORT" with Arabic script beneath on a dark gray cladding. A central portico of thick sandy‑beige columns with flared lotus/papyrus capitals evokes ancient Egyptian motifs, flanked by blue‑tinted glass curtain walls. In the foreground are the drop‑off roadway with yellow‑edged curbs, a black SUV, a silver luggage trolley, trimmed rounded shrubs, grass, and travelers near the doors under clear late‑day light and a blue sky.

details.description: The image shows the front exterior of a modern airport terminal with a long portico supported by tall columns and a flat roof overhang. Above the entrance, the sign reads SPHINX INTERNATIONAL AIRPORT in English, with smaller Arabic script beneath. The foreground features a paved drop-off area with a yellow-and-black curb, a landscaped island with trimmed shrubs, and a dark SUV with a luggage cart nearby. Pedestrians are visible near the entrance. The building has large glass sections on the left, a beige/tan façade, and a clear blue sky overhead, giving a contemporary airport aesthetic.

A clear, eye-level outdoor photograph showing the exterior facade of the Sphinx International Airport terminal building. The architecture features a distinctive blend of modern glass curtain walls and Ancient Egyptian (Pharaonic) revival elements, most notably a colonnade of tall, beige pillars with lotus-flower capitals supporting the roof overhang. Large, white 3D lettering along the roofline reads "SPHINX INTERNATIONAL AIRPORT" in English and "مطار سفنكس الدولي" in Arabic. In the foreground, there is a paved asphalt drop-off lane where a black Kia Sportage SUV is parked next to a blue luggage trolley. A strip of manicured green lawn separates the driveway from the terminal entrance, where several pedestrians and travelers can be seen. The sky above is a vibrant, cloudless blue.

details.description: A daytime outdoor shot of the terminal building at Sphinx International Airport in Giza, Egypt. The building features a modern facade with a prominent flat roof overhang supported by a row of thick, yellow-toned columns designed in an Ancient Egyptian (Pharaonic) style. The name 'SPHINX INTERNATIONAL AIRPORT' is written in English and Arabic across the top of the entrance. In the foreground, a black Kia Sportage SUV is parked on the asphalt road next to a blue luggage trolley. A patch of green lawn and a sidewalk with yellow and black painted curbs separate the road from the building. Several people are visible walking near the entrance under a clear, bright blue sky.

details.description: Daytime curbside view of the main terminal entrance at Sphinx International Airport. The facade features tan stone/stucco with a long colonnade of cylindrical columns and a central modern glass-and-metal canopy. Large white letters on the fascia read “SPHINX INTERNATIONAL AIRPORT” with Arabic script beneath. The drop-off lane has yellow-and-black painted curbs, a grass strip, and an asphalt roadway. A dark SUV with a blue-and-silver luggage trolley is parked at the curb, with several travelers near the entrances. Pruned, rounded trees line the walkway under a clear, deep-blue sky.

details.description: A curbside view of the main terminal building at Sphinx International Airport in Giza, Egypt. The image is oriented vertically (rotated 90 degrees clockwise). The modern terminal facade features a distinct colonnade of beige, stylized columns with flared capitals reminiscent of ancient Egyptian architecture, set against a dark glass curtain wall. Large white signage along the roofline reads "SPHINX INTERNATIONAL AIRPORT" in English, with the Arabic name "مطار سفنكس الدولي" displayed above it. In the foreground, a paved drop-off lane contains a black Kia Sportage SUV with a luggage trolley positioned nearby. A strip of manicured green lawn and trimmed topiary trees separates the driveway from the building entrance under a clear, bright blue sky.

details.description: A daylight photograph of the exterior of Sphinx International Airport terminal. The building features a modern design with a prominent row of large, cream-colored columns inspired by ancient Egyptian papyrus or lotus designs. The name 'SPHINX INTERNATIONAL AIRPORT' is displayed in large white block letters on a dark grey facade, accompanied by its Arabic translation 'مطار سفنكس الدولي'. In the foreground, a black SUV is parked next to a luggage trolley on an asphalt road with yellow-painted curbs. A small strip of grass and some manicured bushes separate the road from the terminal entrance where several people are visible. The sky is a clear, bright blue. The image is oriented sideways.
